metadata.description: All-in-one agent harness for Claude Code — 55 core agents always loaded + 136 domain agent-packs on demand, 199 skills, 77 rules, 7 hooks, 3 MCP servers. Bundles agency-agents, everything-claude-code, oh-my-claudecode, and gstack with weekly CI auto-sync.

plugins.name: my-claude
plugins.description: 55 core agents always loaded + 136 domain agent-packs on demand (Boss orchestrator, Hephaestus autonomous worker, agency specialists, OMC agents), 199 skills, 77 rules, behavioral correction hooks, and MCP servers (Context7, Exa, grep.app)
